howItWorks.intro: This beer ibu calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: IBU = (Hop oz × Alpha Acid × Utilization × 7489) / (Batch Size × 100)
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What IBU is good for beer?
faq.answer: It depends on style. Light lagers: 8-15 IBU. Wheat beers: 10-20. Pale ales: 30-50. IPAs: 40-70+. Double IPAs: 60-100+.
